recommendations.title: A Fish Called Wanda
recommendations.overview: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

recommendations.title: Dumb and Dumber
recommendations.overview: Lloyd and Harry are two men whose stupidity is really indescribable. When Mary, a beautiful woman, loses an important suitcase with money before she leaves for Aspen, the two friends (who have found the suitcase) decide to return it to her. After som

recommendations.title: The Burnt Orange Heresy
recommendations.overview: Hired to steal a rare painting from one of the most enigmatic painters of all time, an ambitious art dealer becomes consumed by his own greed and insecurity as the operation spins out of control.

recommendations.title: Mad Money
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

recommendations.title: Ludo
recommendations.overview: Ludo is about the butterfly effect and how, despite all the chaos and crowd of the world, all our lives are inextricably connected. From a resurfaced sex tape to a rogue suitcase of money, four wildly different stories overlap at the whims of fate, c

recommendations.title: Mi fido di te
recommendations.overview: Two different men living in Milan lose their job at the same time. They will become a funny couple of thieves thanks to the poorest of them that was already a thief.

recommendations.title: The Brain
recommendations.overview: Arthur and Anatole are two little robbers. They want to rob money, money that will travel in a special train from Paris to Bruxelles. They don't know that other people have planned to do the same thing.

recommendations.title: Lost & Found
recommendations.overview: Mario, a worker in "lost and found" department, finds a suitcase with a dead baby inside.

recommendations.title: Il Posto

recommendations.title: Safari
